namespace Demo;

public partial class M
{
    public partial void Update(global::Demo.S src, global::Demo.D dest)
    {
        if (src is null) throw new global::System.ArgumentNullException(nameof(src));
        if (dest is null) throw new global::System.ArgumentNullException(nameof(dest));
        dest.Id = src.Id;
        dest.Name = src.Name;
        dest.Score = __DwarfMap_Num_long__int_4bf5d59e(src.Score!);
    }

    private static int __DwarfMap_Num_long__int_4bf5d59e(long v) => int.CreateChecked(v);
}
